sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97085" key="straggoure/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στραγγουρ-έω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">στράγξ, οὖρον</etym>) <sense id="n97085.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suffer from strangury</tr_>, Poet.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9010.tlg001:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
